chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6232 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.26433/2021 2. For hearing of main case 17.04.2025 Mr. Saleem Altaf, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General Per learned counsel, audit notices have been impugned herein, however, learned counsel states that the same are unwarranted in view of Division Bench judgment of this court reported as 2022 PTD 866. Be that as it may, he states that the petitioner shall respond to the notices before the issuing authority and seeks that the same be adjudicated vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid no coercive action be taken there against. Learned DAG articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the petition be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
